title: 5Pcs Heat-Resistant Mesh Ironing Cloth,Protective Ironing Cloth Mesh Fabric Iron Pressing Cloth,Protective Ironing Scorch Saving Mesh Pressing Pad(40 x 60cm)
features: You will receive 5 pieces of Heat-Resistant Mesh Ironing Cloth in random colors, their size is 40 x 60cm, easy to store and washable many times.
Made of non-flammable and heat-resistant polyester, the mesh lets steam and heat pass through, making it ideal for steam irons.
Just lay Ironing Cloth Mesh flat on your clothes, it's translucent, you can see all the details of your clothes, zippers and snaps won't scratch the iron.
Put a heat-resistant press cloth on the cloth and keep the iron away from your clothes to prevent shine, burns and marks.
Be careful not to leave the heated iron on the cloth to prevent it from melting.
description: Iryna 5Pcs Heat-Resistant Mesh Ironing Cloth,Protective Ironing Cloth Mesh Fabric Iron Pressing Cloth,Protective Ironing Scorch Saving Mesh Pressing Pad(40 X 60Cm)
